title: Taskwright dependency-audit allowlist
description: Reviewed, time-bounded exceptions consumed by scripts/audit-gate.ts (TASK-100).

threshold.description: The gate fails on any advisory at or above this severity that is NOT allowlisted.

ghsa.description: GHSA slug (e.g. GHSA-xxxx-yyyy-zzzz) or id:<n> fallback.

reason.description: Why this advisory is accepted (reachability, dev-only, etc.).

expires.description: Exception expiry, YYYY-MM-DD. Past this date the gate re-fails.
